Saint-Paul de Vence · French Riviera

Mas du Chanoine

Charming bed and breakfast in a 17th century house, between Cannes and Nice

Saint-Paul de Vence

An authentic, world famous, medieval village, loved by many artists

🏛️

17th Century House

A house full of history with charm, warmth and modern comfort

🛏️

Welcome

Charming B&B in Saint-Paul de Vence

In the very heart of the French Riviera, between Cannes and Nice, close to the medieval fortified village of Saint-Paul de Vence, the Mas du Chanoine offers charming guest rooms, only 15 minutes from the beaches of Cagnes-sur-Mer and Antibes.

In this exceptional location, you will benefit from high-end personalized services.

Accommodation

Our guest rooms

Three spacious guest rooms with luxury service and a family suite "Le Petit Mas", all decorated in the Provençal tradition.

Provençal Chic & Modern

Cannoise Guestroom

Sunny room with a view of the fish basin, classy Provençal style with trendy Cannes accents

Junior suite · 388 sq ft · 2 guests · King Size bed · Walk-in shower

Spacious & Cosy

Niçoise Guestroom

Room under the lemon tree, with a view of the fish basin, Provençal style, the charm of Old Nice

Junior suite · 388 sq ft · 2 guests · King Size or twin beds · Walk-in shower

Charm & Village View

Saint Pauloise Guestroom

In the oldest part of the Mas, master bedroom overlooking the village of Saint-Paul de Vence

1st floor · 323 sq ft · 2 guests · King Size bed · Bathtub & shower

Independent & Family

Petit Mas Family Suite

Small independent cottage with 2 bedrooms, for three people traveling together, with a view of the fish basin

Family suite · 377 sq ft · 3 guests · 2 bedrooms · Walk-in shower
View all rooms

Your hosts

Pascale and Yves

welcome you in a friendly, refined and relaxing atmosphere.

Thanks to their knowledge of the region, they will be true ambassadors to help you discover the French Riviera and Provence.

Their advice will make your stay truly memorable. At your request, they will make reservations for restaurants, private beaches, etc.

Testimonials

Guest Book & Testimonials

There are so many wonderful things to say about our stay at your beautiful Mas. We do not know where to begin. Just know we loved meeting you. Your home and our stay has been absolutely perfect in every way. We enjoyed every morning your most delicious breakfasts and especially your homemade cakes.

Lee and Darlene — USA

Your hospitality has been a beautiful memory we will always remember. Always happy to chat and suggest places to go and places to eat. Mas du Chanoine is a gorgeous house and the room has been superb. A wonderful stay, thank you so much.

Peter and Sue — Australia

Thank you so much for your warm welcome to your wonderful home. We have so enjoyed every aspect of all that you offer – from the beautiful room with its exquisitely comfortable bed to the delicious breakfasts. The pool and garden are a delight.

Liz and Barrie — USA
Read all reviews →

Book your stay

Treat yourself to an exceptional stay on the French Riviera, in the intimate setting of Mas du Chanoine.

Choose & Book at the best rate

Mas du Chanoine

Charming guesthouse in Saint-Paul de Vence, French Riviera. A 17th century farmhouse with modern comfort.
